title: Youtube Poop - I need a Slime for Dinner.
description:
What if the actual in-game dialogue was to be replaced by Dragon Warrior Music?

Dragon Warrior (or Dragon Quest - same thing) is the property of Square Enix.

By the way, these are from the Dragon Warrior Monsters 2 OST (Gameboy version)
